title: helichrysum calvertianum
intro: Helichrysum calvertianum, also known as the Yellow Everlasting, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Helichrysum calvertianum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even help with pain management. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, such as essential oil, tincture, and infused oil, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
